Localization.Description: A user logged in to the system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} made an attempt to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} via {protocol.layer7}
A user with the {subject.account.privileges} permissions made an attempt to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} via the local console
A user with the {subject.account.privileges} permissions from host {src.host} made an attempt to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} via {protocol.layer7}
The user {subject.account.name} made an attempt to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} via the local console
